title: lithocarpus microcalyx
intro: Lithocarpus microcalyx, also known as the Chinese tanbark oak or small calyx Lithocarpus, is a species of evergreen tree or shrub native to China. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus microcalyx include its potential to treat fever, respiratory infections, and digestive issues, as well as its use as a tonic to improve overall health. Lithocarpus microcalyx can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a supplement or additive in various formulations.
